Class AdaptiveExecutor

java.lang.Object
com.cmw.adaptive.AdaptiveExecutor
public class AdaptiveExecutor extends Object
Adaptive task executor capable of executing prioritized tasks while dynamically scaling its worker pool according to a configurable scaling strategy.

Features:

  • Priority-based task scheduling
  • Automatic worker scaling
  • Runtime metrics collection
  • Multiple scaling strategies support

This class is thread-safe and can be shared across multiple producer threads.

    Creates and starts a new worker thread.

    Returns the maximum number of workers allowed in this executor.
    ExecutorMetrics
    metrics()
    Returns the runtime metrics instance associated with this executor.
    int

    Returns the minimum number of workers that should always remain active.
    int
    queueSize()
    Returns the current number of tasks waiting in the queue.
    void
    removeWorker()
    Removes a worker from the pool if the minimum worker limit has not been reached.

    shutdown()
    Gracefully shuts down the executor.

    Submits a task for execution.

    Returns the current number of active worker threads.

  • Constructor Details

    • AdaptiveExecutor

      public AdaptiveExecutor(int minWorkers, int maxWorkers, ScalingStrategy strategy)
      Creates a new adaptive executor.
      Parameters:
      minWorkers - minimum number of workers that should always remain active
      maxWorkers - maximum number of workers allowed
      strategy - scaling strategy used to determine desired worker count

  • Method Details

    • createWorker

      public void createWorker()
      Creates and starts a new worker thread.

      This method is primarily intended for internal use by scaling components.

    • removeWorker

      public void removeWorker()
      Removes a worker from the pool if the minimum worker limit has not been reached.

    • submit

      public void submit(TrackedTask task)
      Submits a task for execution.

      The task will be enqueued according to its priority and executed by available workers.

      Parameters:
      task - task to execute

    • metrics

      public ExecutorMetrics metrics()
      Returns the runtime metrics instance associated with this executor.
      Returns:
      executor metrics

    • queueSize

      public int queueSize()
      Returns the current number of tasks waiting in the queue.
      Returns:
      current queue size

    • workerCount

      public int workerCount()
      Returns the current number of active worker threads.
      Returns:
      current worker count

    • minWorkers

      public int minWorkers()
      Returns the minimum number of workers that should always remain active.
      Returns:
      minimum worker count

    • maxWorkers

      public int maxWorkers()
      Returns the maximum number of workers allowed in this executor.
      Returns:
      maximum worker count

    • shutdown

      public void shutdown() throws InterruptedException
      Gracefully shuts down the executor.

      Stops the scaling manager and waits for all workers to terminate.

      Throws:
      InterruptedException - if interrupted while waiting
